name: refilla
description: AI Account Tracker — local desktop app for managing AI service quotas and conversation context

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json -w" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: tsc && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: tsc && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:linux: tsc && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --linux

author: 🔱 PEGASUS
